# daytona_sandbox_ancestors (Data Source)

Reads the fork ancestor chain of a Daytona sandbox.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_sandbox_ancestors" "example" {
  sandbox_id_or_name = "child-sandbox"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `sandbox_id_or_name` (String) Daytona sandbox ID or name.

### Optional

- `request_organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID to send as `X-Daytona-Organization-ID`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Data source identifier.
- `items` (Attributes List) Returned Daytona sandboxes. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Daytona sandbox ID.
- `name` (String) Sandbox name.
- `state` (String) Current sandbox state.
